title: CLIENT ASSISTANCE OFFICE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BAR CLIENT ASSISTANCE OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Reviews all inquiries and complaints regarding Oregon lawyer conduct. May provide some assistance if the inquiry or complaint does not involve misconduct. May refer to another resource, if needed. Bar resources include the Fee Arbitration Program, the Client Security Fund, and the Professional Liability Fund. Complaints that present sufficient evidence of a violation are referred to the Disciplinary Counsel's Office. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 620-0222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 620-0222 Main phone (800) 452-8260 Toll-free Main phone (503) 620-0222 Client Assistant Office FAX (503) 684-1366 Toll-free (800) 452-8260 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Complaints may be submitted electronically or regular mail. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Lawyer Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - LEGAL LINKS LEGAL SERVICES - LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE LEGAL SERVICES - MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL LEGAL SERVICES - MODEST MEANS PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BAR
